title: Menace Reveal/Detection System Analysis
description: Comprehensive analysis of visibility, detection, and reveal event handlers in the Menace tactical game

actor_visibility.description: Controls whether actors are visible to the player and other factions

Actor.Revealed.description: If true, actor is permanently revealed (can be seen even with concealment)

Actor.DetectedByFactionMask.description: Bitmask indicating which factions have detected this actor

Actor.DetectionIcon.description: UI icon shown when actor is detected but not directly visible

Actor.IsVisibleToPlayer3DModel.description: Flag indicating if 3D model is currently rendered for player

entity_properties.description: Combat stats that affect detection calculations

Detection_Base.description: Base detection stat for spotting concealed enemies

Concealment_Base.description: Base concealment stat for hiding from enemies

tile_visibility.description: Tile-level fog of war and visibility tracking

Tile.VisibilityMask.description: Bitmask of factions that can see this tile. Bit 1=Player, Bit 2=Allies

Tile.IsBlockingLoS.description: If true, this tile blocks line of sight

tactical_manager_events.description: Central event system for visibility changes

OnVisibleToPlayer_Delegate.description: Event fired when actor becomes visible to player

OnHiddenToPlayer_Delegate.description: Event fired when actor becomes hidden from player

actor_reveal_detection.name: Actor.get_Revealed
actor_reveal_detection.description: Returns the Revealed boolean flag at offset 0x1AC

actor_reveal_detection.name: Actor.set_Revealed
actor_reveal_detection.description: Sets the Revealed boolean flag at offset 0x1AC

actor_reveal_detection.name: Actor.IsDetectedByFaction
actor_reveal_detection.description: Checks if actor is detected by a specific faction using bitmask at 0x138

actor_reveal_detection.name: Actor.SetDetectedByFaction
actor_reveal_detection.description: Marks actor as detected by a faction. For player factions (1,2), sets combined mask to 6 and clears detection icon

actor_reveal_detection.name: Actor.ResetDetectedByFaction
actor_reveal_detection.description: Resets all detection state - clears faction mask and revealed flag
actor_reveal_detection.logic: Sets DetectedByFactionMask based on TacticalManager state, clears Revealed flag

actor_reveal_detection.name: Actor.ClearDetectionIcon
actor_reveal_detection.description: Removes the WorldSpaceIcon at offset 0xE8 from the HUD

actor_visibility.name: Actor.SetVisibility
actor_visibility.description: Main visibility state setter. Handles state transitions and updates all child elements
logic: State 1 (Visible): Sets flag at 0x16D, clears detection icon, calls OnVisibleToPlayer
Iterates all child Elements and updates their visibility

actor_visibility.name: Actor.get_VisibilityState
actor_visibility.description: Returns visibility state enum at offset 0x1A8

actor_visibility.name: Actor.ResetVisibilityToAI
actor_visibility.description: Resets AI visibility tracking at offset 0x1A4 to 0

actor_visibility.name: Actor.OnVisibleToPlayer
actor_visibility.description: Event handler when actor becomes visible to player
logic: Adjusts time scale for non-player enemies

actor_visibility.name: Actor.OnHiddenToPlayer
actor_visibility.description: Event handler when actor becomes hidden from player

line_of_sight.name: Actor.HasLineOfSightTo
line_of_sight.description: Complex visibility check combining LoS, range, and stats
logic: 3. Check basic line of sight between tiles
6. If target is Revealed, return distance <= vision
7. Calculate cover penalty from target's tile
10. Apply formula: EffectiveRange = Vision - max(0, Concealment + Cover + TileHeight - Detection)

line_of_sight.name: LineOfSight.HasLineOfSight
line_of_sight.description: Core ray-tracing algorithm for LoS between tiles
logic: Ray-traces from source to target tile
Checks each tile along path for blocking
Max 1000 iterations to prevent infinite loops

line_of_sight.name: Tile.HasLineOfSightTo
line_of_sight.description: Tile-level LoS check with bidirectional verification

line_of_sight.name: Tile.IsBlockingLineOfSight
line_of_sight.description: Simple check of blocking flag at offset 0x60

tile_visibility.name: Tile.AddVisibility
tile_visibility.logic: For player factions (1,2), sets mask to 6. Otherwise sets individual bit. Clears FoW flag.

tile_visibility.name: Tile.IsVisibleToFaction
tile_visibility.description: Checks if tile is visible to a specific faction

tile_visibility.name: Tile.IsVisibleToPlayer
tile_visibility.description: Quick check if tile visible to player (checks bit 2 of mask at 0x58)

tile_visibility.name: Tile.IsVisibleToActor
tile_visibility.description: Checks if tile visible to specific actor considering stats
tile_visibility.logic: Calculates effective range using Vision - max(0, concealment - Detection), then checks LoS if in range

map_visibility.name: Map.AddVisibility
map_visibility.description: Adds visibility to tile and handles entity detection
logic: Adds tile visibility if newly visible
If enemy entity found, notifies AI faction via OnOpponentSighted

map_visibility.name: Map.UpdateVisibilityForActor
map_visibility.description: Updates all visible tiles for an actor based on their vision range

map_visibility.name: Map.ClearVisibility
map_visibility.description: Clears all visibility data from the map

map_visibility.name: Map.SetUseFogOfWar
map_visibility.logic: When enabled, clears visibility and recalculates for all player faction actors

tactical_manager.name: TacticalManager.RecalculateVisibilityBasedOnVision
tactical_manager.description: Full visibility recalculation for all actors
logic: For each non-dead actor, calls Map.UpdateVisibilityForActor
Then iterates ally faction (index 2) actors similarly

tactical_manager.name: TacticalManager.InvokeOnVisibleToPlayer
tactical_manager.description: Broadcasts visibility event to all listeners

tactical_manager.name: TacticalManager.InvokeOnHiddenToPlayer
tactical_manager.description: Broadcasts hidden event to all listeners

ai_detection.name: AIFaction.OnOpponentSighted
ai_detection.description: Called when AI faction detects an opponent
logic: Searches existing opponents list for match
If found, updates threat level (max of old and new)
If not found, creates new Opponent object with Assessment
Updates Assessment if faction is currently active

ai_detection.name: EventManager.AddMenaceDetectedEvent
ai_detection.description: Adds a detection event to the strategy layer event queue

visibility_check_action.name: VisibilityCheckAction.GetVisibilityReport
visibility_check_action.description: Generates detailed visibility analysis for UI display

visibility_calculation_formula.description: How effective vision range is calculated
steps: 2. If target has Revealed flag, use full Vision range
- Get target tile's cover value (from cover direction)
4. TotalPenalty = max(0, Concealment + Cover + TileHeight - Detection)
6. Target is visible if Distance <= EffectiveVision AND has LineOfSight

actor_becomes_visible: Camera controller receives event for focus
actor_becomes_hidden: Tile no longer visible to player
Detection icon added for enemy actors

discovery_system.description: Separate from visibility - tracks if entity has ever been seen by a faction

functions.name: Entity.IsDiscovered
functions.description: Checks if entity has been discovered by specified faction

functions.name: Actor.OnDiscovered
functions.description: Called when actor is discovered by a faction. Updates both discovery (0x50) and detection (0x138) masks. Clears detection icon for player discoveries.

skill_event_handlers.description: Skill effect handlers that interact with visibility system

functions.name: ChangeIconVisibility
functions.description: Shows/hides target painted icon on actor HUD based on visibility state

functions.name: OnVerifyTarget
functions.description: Validates targeting - disallows targeting invisible entities. Checks LoS flag at tile 0x1c bit 3 and entity visibility state at 0x90

functions.name: Tile.GetCover
functions.description: Returns cover value (0-3) from a direction. Considers half-cover structures and actors providing cover.

renamed_functions_in_ghidra.reason: Clarifies this is the full visibility check with stat calculations
Clarifies this is the core ray-tracing algorithm
Clarifies this performs flood-fill visibility from an actor
